message:
Unify connector detection via franken_detection_for_connector and migrate semantic search to frankensearch HNSW

Refactored all 14 connector detect() methods to delegate to the shared
franken_detection_for_connector() helper, eliminating ~400 lines of
duplicated CWD probing / env-var fallback boilerplate across aider, amp,
chatgpt, claude_code, clawdbot, cline, codex, copilot, cursor, gemini,
openclaw, opencode, pi_agent, and vibe connectors.

Replaced the local ann_index::HnswIndex with frankensearch's native
VectorIndex/HnswIndex for semantic search, adding FsSemanticDocId
encoding, FsSemanticFilterAdapter, and FrankensearchHnswIndex wrapper
to bridge the CASS search pipeline to frankensearch's HNSW implementation.
Enhanced the semantic indexer to build and query frankensearch indices
natively. Updated search UI palette and app rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
